title: calc-app fails: 'error while loading shared libraries'
description_md:
Running `calc-app` fails immediately with `error while loading shared libraries: libcalc.so.1: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory`. Someone was recently "cleaning up old library versions" on this box. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), figure out what actually happened to the library, restore it properly, and get `calc-app` running again.

You're done when `calc-app` runs successfully.
